Ivan wasn’t all bad, notes Mr Morrison. He introduced a few useful “To hell with him!” Ivan scowled. “He made no attempt to recover!” Ivan the Terrible killed a jester by pouring scalding soup on his head.

equally, as much as that of any metropolis, Moscow’s character has paranoia and ravenous power.
